title: Fresh Maids
description: A resource pack that adds Fresh Animations to Fairy Maids from Touhou Little Maid mod.
body:
Make sure to use 2.2.2 of Entity Model Features or things will get ugly.

I also recommand using Touhou Little Maid 1.12 and later.

I don't recommand using optifine, and is not tested on yet.

## __Overview__
This resource pack aims to bring Maid Fairies to life with this additional Fresh Animations pack, with additional modifications gives Fairy Maids cute eyes.


# Credits
FreshLX: Creator of Fresh Animations resourcepack. The pillager, piglin, allay, and cow animations of the Fresh Animations pack were used as the base of this pack.

TartaricAcid: Creator of Touhou Little Maid mod

Zhi-Ban: Texture base
